entries.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.
Thank you for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics.
Would you like to create a demo patient profile? I just need your first and last name to get started.
Hola, buenos días. Quisiera pedir una cita para un chequeo de rutina, por favor. Lo más pronto que tengan disponible.
Are you still there? I am going to end the call now. Goodbye.
